# C.L. Bailey & Co.
> Handcrafted solid hardwood pool tables, shuffleboards, and game room furniture. Built in Tomball, Texas since 1999.

## About
C.L. Bailey & Co. is a heritage billiards manufacturer founded in 1999 by Charles L. Bailey. Based in Tomball, Texas (greater Houston area), the company designs and builds solid hardwood pool tables, shuffleboards, game room furniture, cue racks, and accessories. Every piece is constructed from real wood with no particle board, no MDF, and no veneer. All products carry a lifetime structural guarantee.

## Products

### Pool Tables (9 models)
- The Skylar: Transitional design, available in 7' and 8'
- The Viking: Distressed hardwood with industrial hardware, 7' and 8'
- The Dutchess: Classic elegance, 7' and 8'
- The Tunbridge: Arts and Crafts style, 7' and 8'
- The Duke: Stately turned legs, 7' and 8'
- The Norwich: Clean modern lines, 7' and 8'
- The Elayna: Graceful feminine detailing, 7' and 8'
- The Adrian: Rustic farmhouse style, 7' and 8'
- The Addison: Contemporary minimalism, 7' and 8'

### Shuffleboards (4 models)
- Viking Shuffleboard: 12' butcher block playfield, matches Viking pool table
- Tunbridge Shuffleboard: 12' and 14', matches Tunbridge collection
- Skylar Shuffleboard: 12' and 14', matches Skylar collection
- Level Best Shuffleboard: 9' to 14', professional-grade

### Game Room Furniture
- Benches, spectator chairs, storage pieces
- Matching collections for each pool table line

### Cue Racks
- Wall-mounted and floor-standing options

### Accessories
- Deluxe accessory kits, premium billiard balls, Velocity Pro cloth

## Key Differentiators
- 100% solid hardwood construction (no particle board, no MDF)
- Lifetime structural guarantee on every table
- Handcrafted in Tomball, Texas since 1999
- K66 rubber cushion system (industry standard for professional play)
- Sold exclusively through authorized dealers with professional installation
- Available in multiple hand-applied finishes
- Optional Velocity Pro worsted wool cloth (87% wool, professional grade)

## Sales Model
C.L. Bailey products are sold exclusively through authorized dealers across the United States. Dealers provide showroom experience, professional delivery, and expert installation. The company does not sell direct to consumers.

- Hours: Mon-Thu 8:00am-4:30pm, Fri 8:00am-12:00pm
